Executive Director

The Vanier Institute of the Family (“Vanier Institute”) seeks a visionary leader for the role of Executive Director. If you share a passion for the role of families within Canada and enjoy operating in a multi-stakeholder, partnership-driven environment, consider lending your organizational leadership expertise and innovation skillset to this dynamic and unique role.  

ABOUT THE VANIER INSTITUTE

The Vanier Institute is a national charitable organization committed to enhancing family wellbeing by making information about families accessible and actionable. Positioned at the centre of networks of researchers, educators, policymakers, and organizations with an interest in and knowledge of families, we share evidence and strengthen the understanding of families in Canada, in all their diversities, to support evidence-based decisions that promote family wellbeing.

THE OPPORTUNITY
